location: Inside a chest at Fort Gael in southwestern Caelid. Past the fort's entrance, follow the tree roots to a ladder leading up above the Lion Guardian's area, cross the long beam, then drop down to a door opening into a dark room containing the chest.
tactics: You don't need to fight the Lion Guardian below — the ladder/beam route lets you bypass it entirely by going up and over.
Fort Gael is patrolled by soldiers, knights, and a flaming chariot — approach from Fort Gael North grace and pick off stragglers rather than pulling the whole fort.
Caelid's Scarlet Rot swamp is nearby, watch rot buildup while exploring the area.
lore: An imported dagger reshaped with a distinctive fist-guard handle so its blade swings like a punch rather than a stab.

builds.name: Dex quality bleed
builds.why: Matched D/D Strength/Dexterity scaling and a high 110 critical multiplier make it a strong base for a Blood-infused bleed build via ash of war swap.

builds.name: Riposte/critical build
builds.why: High critical damage rewards backstab- and riposte-focused playstyles.
